name: Reliance on Cookies without Validation and Integrity Checking in a Security Decision
description: The product uses cookie values for security-related decisions without proper validation or integrity checking. Attackers can easily modify cookies in the browser or by implementing a custom client, bypassing authentication and authorization controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node receives cookie data that flows directly to an AUTH or CONTROL node making security decisions without a TRANSFORM node performing integrity verification (HMAC, signature checking) on the cookie value.
